content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Graph Valid Tree". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/graph-valid-tree/solutions/
content.inputFormat: The input will be an integer n representing the number of nodes in the graph, and an array of pairs edges representing the edges in the graph.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a boolean indicating whether the graph is a valid tree.

solution.approach: Use Union Find to check if the graph is connected and has no cycles.
